CREATE TABLE nodes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO nodes (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Node1');
INSERT INTO nodes (id, name) VALUES (2, 'Node2');
INSERT INTO nodes (id, name) VALUES (3, 'Node3');
SELECT * FROM nodes;
SELECT name FROM nodes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM nodes WHERE name LIKE 'Node%');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nodes WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM nodes);
CREATE TABLE tasks (task_id INT PRIMARY KEY, task_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, node_id INT REFERENCES nodes(id));
INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, task_name, node_id) VALUES (1, 'shutdown', 1);
INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, task_name, node_id) VALUES (2, 'restart', 2);
INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, task_name, node_id) VALUES (3, 'dbg_obj_print', 3);
SELECT task_name FROM tasks WHERE node_id IN (SELECT id FROM nodes WHERE name = 'Node1' OR name = 'Node2');
SELECT nodes.name, tasks.task_name FROM nodes JOIN tasks ON nodes.id = tasks.node_id;
UPDATE tasks SET task_name = 'dbg_obj_print (?)' WHERE task_id = 3;
SELECT DISTINCT task_name FROM tasks WHERE task_name LIKE 'shutdown%';
INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, task_name, node_id) SELECT MAX(task_id) + 1, 'shutdown', id FROM nodes;
EXECUTE cl_exec('shutdown');
EXECUTE cl_exec('dbg_obj_print (?)', vector('hello'));
EXECUTE cl_exec('RESTART');
EXECUTE cl_exec('INSERT INTO tasks (task_id, task_name, node_id) VALUES (4, ''new_task'', 1);');
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_name IN (SELECT task_name FROM tasks ORDER BY task_id ASC LIMIT 5);
CREATE INDEX idx_task_name ON tasks(task_name);
